data.title: Kazia Therapeutics reveals new data on nuclear PD-L1 degrader showing potential to address immunotherapy resistance.
data.description: A recent study has revealed that nuclear PD-L1, a previously overlooked factor, plays a significant role in both immunotherapy resistance and the advancement of metastatic cancer. Kazia Therapeutics, a pharmaceutical company dedicated to oncology research and development, listed on the NASDAQ as KZIA, is at the forefront of developing innovative treatments for challenging cancers. This discovery sheds light on the importance of addressing nuclear PD-L1 in devising effective therapies.
ProMIS Neurosciences secures funding of $175 million through private placement financing.

data.title: Sunstone Hotel Investors reports tax treatment of 2025 dividends for common stock and preferred stock holders.
data.description: Earlier today, in Aliso Viejo California, Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. (NYSE: SHO) disclosed the tax treatment for the 2025 distributions to shareholders of the Company's common stock and Series H and Series I preferred stock. This announcement pertains to the record payable dates...

data.title: Nuwellis appoints Carisa Schultz as CFO with expertise in public company healthcare finance and medical tech to aid growth.
data.description: Bringing valuable expertise in public company healthcare finance and medical technology, Schultz joins Nuwellis to bolster the company's growth. With a proven track record in these fields, Schultz's addition is expected to propel Nuwellis to new heights. This strategic move comes at a crucial time as Nuwellis prepares for its next phase of expansion and development. Schultz's background in healthcare finance and medical technology aligns perfectly with Nuwellis' objectives, making this partnership a promising venture. Investors and stakeholders are optimistic about the positive impact Schultz will have on Nuwellis' future prospects.

data.title: Applied Aerospace & Defense opens new RF testing facility in Huntsville, Alabama, offering precision testing for antennas and electronics.
data.description: Applied Aerospace & Defense (Applied) disclosed on January 30, 2026, its plans to inaugurate a state-of-the-art Radio Frequency (RF) test range along with corresponding services at its Huntsville, Alabama base. The new facility will cater to precise RF testing for antennas and electronics.

data.title: BIGO Ads partners with Pixalate for better traffic quality in mobile advertising, tackling authenticity challenges.
data.description: In Singapore on January 30, 2026, BIGO Ads, an AI-powered programmatic advertising platform, operating under JOYY Inc. (NASDAQ: JOYY), revealed an enhanced collaboration with Pixalate to address the rising issue of traffic authenticity in the mobile advertising sector.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Southwest Las Vegas - Landings & Reserves at Aven; homes from mid $400,000s.
data.description: A new residential development called Aven is now offering custom-built homes on spacious lots near schools and outdoor amenities in the city of Las Vegas. The homes are priced starting from the mid $400,000s. This announcement was made by KB Home (NYSE: KBH), a leading home construction company in the United States.

data.title: Stanley Black & Decker appoints Francesca Campbell as Senior VP, General Counsel. Campbell joins from Carrier.
data.description: Francesca Campbell has been appointed as the Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary at Stanley Black & Decker, a prominent company in tools and outdoor solutions, on January 30, 2026. Prior to this role, Campbell served at Carrier. Stanley Black & Decker is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SWK.

data.title: IES Hldgs (NASDAQ: IESC) Q1 earnings missed estimates by -6.0% with EPS of $3.71 vs $3.94. Revenue increased by $121.5M.
data.description: On Friday, January 30, 2026, IES Hldgs (NASDAQ: IESC) released its Q1 earnings at 07:45 AM. The earnings report revealed that IES Hldgs fell short of projected earnings by -6.0%, with an EPS of $3.71 compared to an estimated $3.94. Additionally, revenue saw an increase of $121.50 million from the previous year. In the previous quarter, IES Hldgs showcased performance that can be further explored on Benzinga.com.
German Inflation Edges Above 2% Before First ECB Meeting of 2026

data.title: SoFi surpasses Q4 earnings and revenue targets, stock rises as record membership adds reported.
data.description: The stock of SoFi saw an increase following the fintech company's announcement of its fourth-quarter earnings and revenue. These figures exceeded the expectations set by Wall Street. SoFi reported accelerated earnings growth, with record membership additions contributing to this success.

data.title: IES Hldgs (IESC) Q1 earnings: Missed estimates by -6.0% with EPS $3.71 vs. estimate of $3.94. Revenue up $121.50 million.
data.description: IES Hldgs (NASDAQ: IESC) released its Q1 earnings report on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 07:45 AM. The report revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -6.0%, with an EPS of $3.71 compared to the estimated $3.94. However, there was a positive increase in revenue, which rose by $121.50 million from the same period the previous year. Further analysis and details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chevron and Exxon Mobil reported Q4 earnings; only one saw profit growth. Focus on U.S. oil prices and Venezuela crisis.
data.description: Before the stock market opened on Friday, both Chevron and Exxon Mobil disclosed their earnings for the fourth quarter. While both oil companies reported strong earnings, only one of the supermajors experienced a growth in profits. The focus has shifted to the U.S. oil prices and the situation in Venezuela following these reports.

data.title: Chevron maintains cap on Venezuela spending despite Trump's investment push. Capex for 2026 is $18-19B. Will not increase investment this year.
data.description: Chevron Corporation has decided to maintain its current level of capital spending in Venezuela despite President Trump's call for increased investment. The U.S. oil major stated they will not be increasing capital spending in Venezuela this year and are currently producing 250,000 barrels a day. They plan to potentially grow that by up to 50% over the next 18 to 24 months pending additional U.S. government authorizations. Chevron's capital expenditure for 2026 was estimated to be between $18-19 billion. CEO Mike Wirth mentioned Chevron will continue engaging with both U.S. and Venezuelan governments to further shared energy goals due to their longstanding relationship with Venezuela. Chevron is the sole American oil major operating in Venezuela currently.

data.title: Verizon exceeds profit expectations for 2026, stock rises. Q4 earnings, revenue, and wireless subscribers beat. Job cuts planned.
data.description: The stock of Verizon rose following the release of their 2026 profit guidance, which exceeded expectations under the leadership of a new CEO. In the fourth quarter, the company reported earnings, revenue, and an increase in wireless subscribers that surpassed projections. The positive outcomes in their financial performance were highlighted in the news as Verizon's earnings beat expectations. Additionally, the company's 2026 profit outlook was reported to be above views, despite ongoing job cuts within the organization.

data.title: Learn from mistakes, be productive, avoid carelessness. Key to learning more. -Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Errors are bound to occur. To benefit from them, make intentional mistakes that lead to growth and steer clear of those that stem from negligence. This approach will result in greater learning opportunities. This information was provided in an article titled "Mistakes Happen — How To Make Sure You Learn From Them," published on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Trump will announce Fed chair pick. New front-runner expected to replace Jerome Powell, decision on Friday.
data.description: President Donald Trump announced that he will reveal his pick for the Federal Reserve chairman on Friday morning, with a new leading candidate emerging for the position. This development comes after speculation and anticipation surrounding the potential replacement of Jerome Powell.

data.title: SpaceX considers merging with Tesla or xAI before IPO. Elon Musk owns both, Tesla stock surged.
data.description: Elon Musk, the owner of SpaceX and xAI, is considering a merger with Tesla before SpaceX's upcoming IPO. Following this news, Tesla's stock saw a significant increase. This development has sparked interest among investors and industry analysts in the potential collaboration between these prominent companies.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop as Trump picks Kevin Warsh as Fed chief; Sandisk soars on earnings; Tesla rises on SpaceX news.
data.description: The stock market experienced a decline in futures following President Trump's announcement of Kevin Warsh as his choice for Federal Reserve Chairman. Conversely, Sandisk saw a significant increase in stock value due to strong earnings reports, while Tesla also experienced a rise fueled by positive buzz surrounding SpaceX. The Dow Jones futures dropped as Trump selected Warsh for the Fed chair position, with Sandisk surging and Tesla climbing amidst SpaceX speculation.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile surpasses Q4 earnings with EPS of $0.9 (53% above estimate) and revenue up by $177 million.
data.description: In its Q4 earnings report released on January 30, 2026 at 06:16 AM, Banco Santander Chile (NYSE: BSAC) surpassed estimated earnings by 53.0%, with an EPS of $0.9 compared to the expected $0.59. Revenue saw a significant increase of $177.00 million from the previous year. The company's performance in this quarter exceeded expectations. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
